title: NDLEA Recieve Support From US Agency
description: Shadrach Haruna, Secretary to the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency, NDLEA, leading other top officials of the agency to receive Mr. Tobin Bradley, Deputy Assistant Secretary, US State Department w
html: Shadrach Haruna, Secretary to the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency, NDLEA, leading other top officials of the agency to receive Mr. Tobin Bradley, Deputy Assistant Secretary, US State Department when the latter led a team of US officials to hand over some equipment provided by the INL to enhance the operations of the Agency at its national headquarters in Abuja on Wednesday 6th September 2023
